title: Define writer pipeline and semantic memory rules
summary: Specify event→state→cursor ordering and semantic memory capture/update rules for 0.4.0.
acceptance_criteria: Defines write ordering: event append → state update → cursor persist.
Specifies when and how semantic_summary and user_intent are updated.
Clarifies validation/failure handling for torn-state scenarios.
Aligns with 0.4.0 schema and recovery algorithm.

steps.description: Document the canonical writer pipeline and ordering guarantees.
Define semantic memory update triggers and payload requirements.
Specify failure handling and rebuild triggers for torn-state cases.

notes: Semantic memory must be derived deterministically from canonical artifacts.
